name: AnyRun_Sandbox_File_Windows
author: ANY.RUN Integrations Team
description: Run File analysis using Windows VM

configurationItems.name: get_html_report
configurationItems.description: Attach HTML report to the case as observable

configurationItems.name: get_network_traffic_dump
configurationItems.description: Attach PCAP file to the case as observable

configurationItems.name: get_iocs
configurationItems.description: Attach Analysis IOCs to the case as observables

configurationItems.name: extract_malicious_iocs
configurationItems.description: When enabled, extracts only Suspicious and Malicious IOCs. When disabled, extracts all IOCs

configurationItems.name: env_bitness
configurationItems.description: Bitness of Operation System. Supports 32, 64 for Windows. 64 for Windows Server 2025

configurationItems.name: env_type
configurationItems.description: Environment preset type. You can select **development** env for OS Windows 10 x64. For all other cases, **complete** env is required

configurationItems.name: env_locale
configurationItems.description: Operation System language. Use locale identifier or country name Example - ( "en-US" or "Brazil"). Case insensitive

configurationItems.name: opt_privacy_type
configurationItems.description: Privacy settings. Supports: public, bylink, owner, byteam

configurationItems.name: opt_auto_delete_after
configurationItems.description: Specify after what period of time this report should be deleted. Supports: day, week, 2 weeks, month. Leave blank for the task's infinite lifetime

configurationItems.name: obj_ext_startfolder
configurationItems.description: Start object from. Supports: desktop, home, downloads, appdata, temp, windows, root

configurationItems.name: obj_force_elevation
configurationItems.description: Forces the file to execute with elevated privileges and an elevated token (for PE32, PE32+, PE64 files only)

configurationItems.name: user_tags
configurationItems.description: Append User Tags to new analysis. Only characters a-z, A-Z, 0-9, hyphen (-), and comma (,) are allowed. Max tag length - 16 characters. Max unique tags per analysis - 8
